title: Idempotency
content: A request is idempotent if repeating it produces the same result. For POST /events, sending the same eventId with the same payload returns 200 and does not create a duplicate. Sending same eventId with different payload returns 409 Conflict.

title: Rate Limiting
content: The API enforces rate limiting. Exceeding 5 requests per minute returns 429 Too Many Requests with a Retry-After header. Clients should back off.

title: Dependency Failure
content: If the downstream database is unavailable, POST /events returns 503 Service Unavailable. The request should be retried later.
